plugins.name: ccube-fds-web-app-builder
plugins.description: VS Code agent plugin that builds web applications strictly following the Flagship Design System — enforces FDS components, tokens, and accessibility patterns across every Copilot suggestion.

plugins.name: ccube-software-craft
plugins.description: VS Code agent plugin for software engineering knowledge — SOLID principles, design patterns, clean code, architecture styles, git workflow, testing strategy, and debugging methodology. For anyone writing software, not just dedicated engineers.
